data.name: Error_PostScriptInsteadOfPdf
data.value: The printer sent PostScript instead of PDF. Reinstall the PrintoCrypt printer from Settings.

data.name: Error_PostScriptFromPrinter
data.value: The printer sent PostScript instead of XPS. Reinstall the PrintoCrypt printer from Settings.

data.name: Error_InvalidXpsDocument
data.value: The print job does not contain a valid XPS document. Reinstall the PrintoCrypt printer from Settings.

data.name: Error_UnreadablePage
data.value: The print job contained an unreadable page.

data.name: Error_PrintJobNotFound
data.value: Print job file was not found.

data.name: Error_NotReadyToConvert
data.value: PrintoCrypt is not ready to convert print jobs.

data.name: Error_OutlookNotInstalled
data.value: Microsoft Outlook is not installed or not registered on this computer.
